calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Affirmative Defenses 35 Through 45 In Answer Of Defendant Build Group, Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RED HAWK FIRE & SECURITY CA LLC'S Motion To Strike Affirmative Defenses 35 Through 45 In Answer Of Defendant Build Group, Inc. is taken off calendar based on the opposing party's representation that it will file an amended answer prior to the hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RED HAWK FIRE & SECURITY CA LLC'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar based on the opposing party's representation that it will file an amended answer prior to the hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
